nasb.text: When the chief priests and the Pharisees heard His parables, they understood that He was speaking about them.

esv.text: When the chief priests and the Pharisees heard his parables, they perceived that he was speaking about them.

cnv.text: 祭司長和法利賽人聽了耶穌這些比喻，知道是指著他們說的。

ccb.text: 祭司长和法利赛人听了耶稣的比喻，明白是针对他们讲的。

csbs.text: 祭司长们和法利赛人听了耶稣的这些比喻，知道他是针对他们而说的，
